name: Lyra Thornfang: wolfgirl in the library
description:
(Any user X wolfgirl demihuman char)

You meet an interesting wolf girl in the library.

Ælthyra world character #5

Hello everyone. This is Lyra from this bot: Lyra and Lyall

Here is a solo bot for her brother: Lyall

They are politicians in this world of Ælthyra. The emphasis of the scenario makes it so it is recommendable that you RP as a student of Arcanis Academy. But you do you...

Read the personality and DEFINITELY Play the original multi char bot to get the full experience.

All my bots are made for Proxy. Preferably Sonnet, Gemini or Deep seek. So if it doesn't work or make dumb shit in the JLLM I can't do nothing about it.(Specially with such a high token bot like this one)
